summary: Planning engine and simulation rollout layer for enterprise agent decision optimization.
findings: simulatePlan() performs rollout over action sequences against WorldState
selectBestPolicy() scores rollout outcomes and returns highest-scoring plan
Enterprise action space defined: deploy_software, launch_campaign, change_pricing, hire_team, ship_feature
Policy gate blocks simulation when WORLD_MODEL_ENABLED=false
Target planning success rate delta: +30% over non-simulated baseline
